title: Extracted Catalogue Publication Delete Moment Service Routes
summary: Moved Local Studio moment save, publication preview/apply, and delete apply catalogue routes from fake in-process `catalogue_write_server.Handler` reuse to focused callable service modules behind `scripts/catalogue/catalogue_write_service.py`.
effect: The local app server now owns all active catalogue editor write endpoints except bulk save through direct service functions, preserving source writes, cleanup transactions, scoped build/search follow-through, backups, lookup refreshes, and Studio Activity behavior without constructing legacy HTTP handlers.
